text: As a User, I want the system to automatically calculate priority scores based on benefit, penalty, cost, and risk ratings, so that I can objectively prioritize features.
As a Product Manager, I want to customize the weights for each prioritization factor, so that I can tailor the calculation to my organization's values.
As a Product Manager, I want an interactive matrix view to visualize prioritized features, so that I can understand the distribution of priorities.
As a User, I want customizable filters and sorting options in the feature list view, so that I can focus on relevant subsets of features.
As a User, I want to import feature data from CSV files, so that I can quickly populate my backlog without manual entry.
As a User, I want to export prioritized data to CSV, so that I can share results and use the data in other tools.
As a Product Manager, I want to invite team members to collaborate on prioritization, so that we can align on priorities as a team.
As a Team Member, I want to add comments to features, so that I can explain my reasoning for specific ratings.
As a Product Manager, I want to generate PDF reports of prioritized features, so that I can share summaries with executives.
As a User, I want to see visualization charts of priority distribution, so that I can understand the overall prioritization landscape.
As a New User, I want contextual help and tooltips, so that I can understand the Relative Weighting methodology while using the software.
As a User, I want access to interactive tutorials on feature prioritization, so that I can learn best practices for prioritization.
As a Developer, I want API access to the prioritization system, so that I can integrate with other tools in our workflow.
As a Product Manager, I want to connect to project management tools, so that I can sync prioritized features with our roadmap tools.
As a User, I want my prioritization data stored securely in my browser, so that I don't lose work between sessions.
As a User, I want to save and load my prioritization data as local files, so that I can back up my work and share it with others.
As a User, I want to customize the interface theme, so that I can adjust the appearance to my preferences.
As a Product Manager, I want to upload a CSV file with feature data and see how stories are connected to features, so that I can better organize my backlog and understand feature scope.
As a Product Manager, I want to create multiple prioritization scenarios with different weights, so that I can explore alternative approaches.
As a User, I want to compare prioritization scenarios side-by-side, so that I can understand the impact of different weighting settings.
As a Product Owner, I want to configure team collaboration settings, so that I can control who can edit ratings and weights.
As a User, I want to see a history of changes made to feature ratings, so that I can track revisions and understand how priorities evolved.
As a User, I want to duplicate product backlogs, so that I can create copies for scenario planning or experimentation.
As a User, I want to delete product backlogs, so that I can manage my list and remove obsolete ones.
As a User, I want the application to automatically save my prioritization data as I work, so that I don't lose progress if I close the browser.
As a User, I want keyboard shortcuts for common actions, so that I can navigate and interact more efficiently.
As an Administrator, I want to manage user accounts and roles, so that I can control access and permissions.
As a Startup Founder, I want to see ROI calculations based on prioritization data, so that I can estimate the potential business impact.
As a Product Manager, I want to integrate with user feedback tools, so that I can import user requests into the prioritization process.
As a Product Manager, I want to integrate with analytics platforms, so that I can incorporate usage data into feature estimations.
As a Startup Founder, I want to see a ROI (Return on Investment) calculator based on prioritization data, so that I can estimate the potential business impact of prioritized features.
As a Product Manager, I want to integrate with user feedback tools (e.g., UserVoice), so that I can directly import user requests and feedback into the prioritization process.
As a Product Manager, I want to integrate with analytics platforms (e.g., Google Analytics), so that I can incorporate product usage data into benefit and penalty estimations.
As a Product Manager, I want to compare different prioritization scenarios side-by-side, so that I can evaluate the impact of different weighting or rating adjustments.
As a User, I want to have different visual themes for the application interface (e.g., dark mode), so that I can customize the appearance to my preference.
As a User, I want the application to be accessible on mobile devices (responsive design), so that I can review priorities and make quick adjustments on the go.
As a User, I want to receive email summaries of prioritization changes or updates, so that I can stay informed even when not actively using the application.
As a Product Manager, I want to be able to customize the Priority Score formula (beyond Relative Weighting), so that I can experiment with different prioritization models.
As a User, I want to have undo/redo functionality for actions in the Matrix View, so that I can easily revert changes if needed.
As a User, I want to be able to search for features within the backlog, so that I can quickly find specific features to rate or prioritize.
